title: Soft Fire Gui
body:
![Preview(little)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29405477ff739260b8a6720787a44c164e0fb919.png)This resource pack changes the original gui to a dark one, I hope you like it! The resource pack, as you might guess, is made in dark colors. I chose red as a contrasting color. Some elements, such as the recipe book (book in inventory) were inspired by another resource pack. All other elements were completely invented and drawn by me. 
![Hotbar Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85ada86d01ce25b5feb6d2113ef6c4609fcd8da9.png)
### Mod support
- [Screenshot Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-viewer) - ✅
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - ✅
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - ✅
- [Create(JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - ✅
### **You can offer your mods for support in the issues on Github. There you can leave your feedback or errors in the resource pack**

### Questions:
- Q: Will mod support be added?
- A: yes, most of the popular client and other mods will appear soon!(You can offer your mods for support in the issues on Github)
- Q: Will there be versions with other GUI contrasts added?
- A: Yes, blue, green, yellow (possibly), purple, light gray and cyan will be added soon!
